query:
INSERT INTO `users` (
  `openId`,
  `username`,
  `passwordHash`,
  `name`,
  `email`,
  `loginMethod`,
  `role`,
  `canViewOtherQuotes`,
  `active`,
  `createdAt`,
  `updatedAt`,
  `lastSignedIn`
) VALUES (
  'local-admin-segalla',
  'admin',
  '$2b$10$3pXQhXvP7Z8qK9mL2nR5dOmN8pQ7rS6tU5vW4xY3zZ2aB1cD0eF9m',
  'Administrador',
  'admin@segalla.com.br',
  'local',
  'admin',
  'yes',
  'yes',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
  `passwordHash` = '$2b$10$3pXQhXvP7Z8qK9mL2nR5dOmN8pQ7rS6tU5vW4xY3zZ2aB1cD0eF9m',
  `updatedAt` = NOW();
